error_codes.hint: The voltage measured by the hashboard was significantly lower than expected. Either overcurrent protection on PSU disabled the power to hashboard or there's a short circuit somewhere between PSU and hashboard that makes the voltage significantly lower. Replace broken hashboards or set a lower power target/hashrate target. Another reason for short circuit could be a bad connection of the power rail to the hashboard, like loose screws, or faulty PSU. Please try to tighten the screws and check the PSU.
error_codes.reason: Overcurrent protection triggered or short circuit

errors.message: Tuner error: Stage 4: Stage 4: PSU shut down during the experiment: {ERR:V2} LOW VOLTAGE - measured voltage 0 V - PSU overcurrent protection switched voltage off or short circuit

error_codes.hint: NoPIC miners are powering hashboards all the time and there's no way to disable them in software (they'll have consumption at least 300 W and will heat up even when disabled). If you want to override this behavior, then check `allow_disabling_hashboards_on_nopic_miners = true` option in bosminer-experimental.toml
error_codes.reason: DISABLING hashboards not allowed on NoPIC miners
